introSection: Mighty Mini Mega is a steel roller coaster at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. It is one of four known Mini Mega Coaster MM29 roller coasters built by Pinfari. It opened in 2003. In early 2010, the ride was taken down and rebuilt on top of a new arcade.
fullText:
Mighty Mini Mega is a steel roller coaster at Adventure Island in Southend On Sea, Essex, England, UK. It is one of four known Mini Mega Coaster MM29 roller coasters built by Pinfari. It opened in 2003. In early 2010, the ride was taken down and rebuilt on top of a new arcade.

Yellow track and blue supports.
